headline: Wyoming Officials Trace Rare Bacteria Back to Zuckerberg’s $800 Million ‘Project Cosmo’
summary: A rare bacterium turned up in Cheyenne wastewater months before the public learned about it, and now Congress wants Meta to explain what happened inside its $800 million Wyoming data center and where the contaminated water went next.
